title: BLOCK 3 FINAL: Story with sentences
description: Real story with all three sentence kinds at 32 WPM
text: I have 2 cats. They love to play! Where do they go all day? They climb trees. They chase bees. They sleep in the sun. I love my 2 cats so much!
